name: ui-world-map-board
description: WorldMapBoard — game-shell composition with isometric canvas, overworld hero movement, battle encounters, and walk/idle animation ticks.

schema.name: ui-world-map-board
schema.description: WorldMapBoard — game-shell composition with isometric canvas, overworld hero movement, battle encounters, and walk/idle animation ticks.

emits.description: Emits UI:{heroMoveEvent} with { heroId, toX, toY }
Emits UI:{featureEnterEvent} with { heroId, feature, hex }
Emits UI:{advanceTurnEvent} with {} when the player passes the turn without moving
Called when all enemies or all player heroes are defeated
Emits UI:{playAgainEvent} with {} on play again / reset

events.name: Advance Turn
events.description: Emits UI:{advanceTurnEvent} with {} when the player passes the turn without moving

events.name: Hero Move
events.description: Emits UI:{heroMoveEvent} with { heroId, toX, toY }

events.name: Feature Enter
events.description: Emits UI:{featureEnterEvent} with { heroId, feature, hex }

events.name: Game End
events.description: Called when all enemies or all player heroes are defeated

events.name: Play Again
events.description: Emits UI:{playAgainEvent} with {} on play again / reset

units.label: Units
units.description: Initial hero/unit roster seeded into entity on INIT — team+health drive win/lose conditions.

tiles.label: Tiles
tiles.description: Initial tile map seeded into entity on INIT — passable drives movement validation in the model.

allowMoveAllHeroes.label: Allow Move All Heroes
allowMoveAllHeroes.description: Allow selecting / moving ALL heroes (including enemy). For testing.

diamondTopY.label: Diamond Top Y
diamondTopY.description: Y pixel offset to the top diamond vertex of the isometric grid.

enableCamera.label: Enable Camera
enableCamera.description: Enable pan/zoom camera. Set false for fixed maps where overlay labels need stable positions.

features.label: Features
features.description: World features seeded into entity on INIT.

assetManifest.label: Asset Manifest
assetManifest.description: Direct asset manifest — takes priority over entity-derived manifest.

frameCount.label: Frame count
frameCount.description: Number of sprite frames a unit cycles through before the animation loops.
